mapper.select: SELECT sub_task_id, todo_id, parent_id, name, completed, create_time, update_time FROM web.todo_subtask WHERE todo_id = #{todoId} ORDER BY parent_id NULLS FIRST, create_time ASC
SELECT sub_task_id, todo_id, parent_id, name, completed, create_time, update_time FROM web.todo_subtask WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
